---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  fig.align = "center",
  out.width = "100%"
)
library(htmltools)
knitr::knit_hooks$set(imgcenter = function(before, options, envir){
  if (before) {
    HTML("<p align='center'>")
  } else {
    HTML("</p>")
  }
})
```

# xplots 

[![R-CMD-check](https://github.com/paulnorthrop/xplots/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/paulnorthrop/xplots/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml)

## Functions to produce plots of marks for an exam board

The main functions are:

* `components()`: plots to compare components marks for a given module.
* `modules()`: plots to compare module marks within groups of modules. (**Not available yet!**)

## Installation

To install from GitHub:

```{r installation, eval = FALSE, echo = TRUE}
install.packages("remotes")
install_github("paulnorthrop/xplots")
```
